Single Piston </li></ul></div><h1 class="main-title">Single Piston Planes for Sale</h1><h2 class="main-sub-title"><p>Single Engine Piston aircraft have been produced in large numbers since the 1920s, and are ideal for journeys transporting as many as four people up to 300 nautical miles. Today they are enjoyed by trainee pilots, flying enthusiasts, and entrepreneurs around the world. Often considered the entry point for aircraft ownership, single engine piston aircraft are powered by economical piston powerplants, and their lower operating costs and purchase prices are a big part of their attraction. The variety of makes and models available on the market are almost as extensive as their possible use and performance parameters. The cost to buy one will depend on whether you are shopping the new or used market, the age of the aircraft and its condition. There are dozens of current and past manufacturers of single engine piston aircraft, but some of the household names still active today include <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/beechcraft">Beechcraft</a>, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cessna">Cessna</a>, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus">Cirrus</a>, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/diamond">Diamond</a>, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/mooney">Mooney</a> and <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/piper">Piper.</a></p></h2><div class="multi-search hide"><a href="/sell-my-aircraft" id="post_ad_btn" class="button dark-green-btn"><span class="speaker-icon"></span> Advertise Your Aircraft Now</a></div></div></div><div id="item_search_location_modal" class="reveal" data-reveal><h2 class="modal-title">
Invalid location
</h2><div id="item_search_location" class="">

class="list-item-details"><h2 class="item-title"><a href="/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22-g3-gts/373826">Cirrus SR22 G3 GTS </a></h2><div class="price">Price: USD $349,000</div><div class="list-item-location">Europe, Switzerland, For Sale by <b>Lone Mountain Aircraft Sales</b></div><div class="grid-x grid-margin-x"><div class="large-auto medium-auto cell"><div {

});

})();
}

</script><script>
function loadYoutubeJs(){
var div, n,
v = document.getElementsByClassName("youtube-player");
for (n = 0; n < v.length; n++) {
if ($( v[n]).html() == '') {
div = document.createElement("div");
div.setAttribute("data-id", v[n].dataset.id);
div.innerHTML = labnolThumb(v[n].dataset.id);
div.onclick = labnolIframe;
v[n].appendChild(div);
}
}
$('.lazy_video').Lazy();
}

function labnolThumb(id) {
var thumb = '<picture class="lazy_video"><data-src srcset="https://i.ytimg.com/vi_webp/ID/maxresdefault.webp" type="image/webp"></data-src><data-src srcset="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/ID/maxresdefault.jpg" type="image/jpeg"></data-src><data-img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/ID/maxresdefault.jpg" /></picture>',
play = '<div class="play"></div>';
return thumb.replace("ID", id).replace("ID", id).replace("ID", id) + play;
}

function labnolIframe() {
var iframe = document.createElement("iframe");
var embed = "https://www.youtube.com/embed/ID?autoplay=1&mute=1";
iframe.setAttribute("src", embed.replace("ID", this.dataset.id));
iframe.setAttribute("frameborder", "0");
iframe.setAttribute("allowfullscreen", "1");
this.parentNode.replaceChild(iframe, this);
}
$(document).ready(function() {
loadYoutubeJs();
});
</script><script type="text/javascript">
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
loadImages(entry.target, 1); // Strictly load 1 image per item initially
observer.unobserve(entry.target);
}
});
}, { rootMargin: "200px" });

function loadImages(slide, maxImages = 1) {
if (!slide) return;

// Get all images inside the current item
const pictures = slide.querySelectorAll(".img-cell picture");

// Ensure only 'maxImages' (1 initially) loads
pictures.forEach((picture, index) => {
if (index < maxImages) {
const img = picture.querySelector("img");
const sources = picture.querySelectorAll("source");

if (img && img.dataset.src) {
img.src = img.dataset.src;
img.removeAttribute("data-src");
}
sources.forEach(source => {
if (source.dataset.src) {
source.srcset = source.dataset.src;
source.removeAttribute("data-src");
}
});
}
});
}

function loadNextImage(slide) {
if (!slide) return;

// Get images that are still unloaded
const unloadedPictures = slide.querySelectorAll(".img-cell picture img[data-src]");

if (unloadedPictures.length > 0) {
const nextImg = unloadedPictures[0]; // Load only the next one
nextImg.src = nextImg.dataset.src;
nextImg.removeAttribute("data-src");

// Load sources inside <picture>
const sources = nextImg.closest("picture").querySelectorAll("source");
sources.forEach(source => {
if (source.dataset.src) {
source.srcset = source.dataset.src;
source.removeAttribute("data-src");
}
});
}
}

function loadInitialSlides(slick) {
const currentSlideIndex = slick.currentSlide || 0;

$('.slider-for .slick-slide').each(function (index) {
if (index === currentSlideIndex) {
loadImages(this, 1); // Load only 1 image for the first item
} else {
observer.observe(this); // Observer handles the rest on scroll
}
});
}

$('.slider-for').on('init', function (event, slick) {
setTimeout(() => loadInitialSlides(slick), 100); // Ensure Slick initializes first
}).slick({
initialSlide: 0,
slidesToShow: 1,
slidesToScroll: 1,
arrows: true,
dots: true,
fade: false,
lazyLoad: 'ondemand', // Ensure Slick doesn’t preload all images
infinite: false,
rows: 0,
});

$('.slider-for').on('afterChange', function (event, slick, currentSlide) {
const currentSlideEl = $('.slider-for .slick-slide').eq(currentSlide)[0];
loadNextImage(currentSlideEl); // Load only 1 new image per navigation
});
});


document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
const lazyContent = document.getElementById("avinodeApp");

// Function to dynamically load a script
const loadScript = (url) => {
return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
const script = document.createElement("script");
script.src = url;
script.type = "text/javascript";
script.async = true;

script.onload = () => {
resolve();
};
script.onerror = () => {
console.error(`Error loading ${url}`);
reject(new Error(`Script load error for ${url}`));
};

document.body.appendChild(script);
});
};

// Observer to detect when the content is in view
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
// Load third-party script when content becomes visible
loadScript("https://apps.avinode.com/webapp/rest/bootstrap?Avinode-WEB-APP=eyJraWQiOiIxNkVBQkQ5RS1BRjYyLTQ4NTEtODk5Qi1BM0UwMThGRjYxNDciLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzUxMiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI3MDJjMmRkZS1kYWMyLTQ3ZDAtYjNjOS02ZWM1MThlNWJkZmYiLCJhdmlkb21haW4iOiIuYXZpbm9kZS5jb20iLCJhdml0ZW5hbnQiOjExMzgwLCJpc3MiOiJhdmlub2RlIiwiYXZpdHlwZSI6MTAsImF2aW5vbmNlIjoiMTIyYTQxOGUtNjAyMS00NTYxLTliMDctZjM5YTllNzM4YWVkIn0.grYx3F0W_miFJ2NjbbdmAqEBg8oL0yukdeUIbageL_-2jewkcx6vsmG4kHZ0FshuyjH-8Vho5fSAArG9U3fQ1bYn7ZDA3t3vJp-mzhOaU3ryHKMksr2nROjAZilObNts_6RsyrQtbEBPJYgmCH9n9Skh3GbSkac9tKqjP7Ma_i0hx3SDHx889v4Q-pQHnUCguitkUbQsIPm-UNVDG-ci1qU16xURx1VvMDcaqy2wdumDt9A65QCj_BmYVBS13nRxbI1uegDG6SqLY5ACpoLVJeKdo37uibZS1c1VcF-hFHQ9jWpJbwO4Dbr5JK6zDfsPqBo_7wK0IQjgeKWGemOKEg&analyticsReferrer=https://www.flyingmag.com/")
.then(() => {
})
.catch((err) => {
console.error(err.message);
});

observer.unobserve(lazyContent); // Stop observing after loading
}
});
});

observer.observe(lazyContent);
});

</script><script language="javascript" type="text/javascript">

function initAutocomplete()
{

fieldRoute: 'field-route',

fieldEntity: 'field-entity',

showAllOption: 'show-all-option',

});
}

});

window.ondragstart = function() { return false; }
$("body").on("contextmenu", "img", function(e) {
return false;
});

{
"@context": "https://schema.org",
"@graph": [
{
"@type": "ItemList",
"itemListElement": [
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 1,
"name": "Cirrus SR22 G3 GTS 237||_||, Europe, Switzerland",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373801_373900/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22-g3-gts-373826_5e024bf63115291d_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22-g3-gts/373826",
"description": "Lone Mountain Aircraft is pleased to offer N978SR, a stunning, ultra-cared for upgraded Cirrus Aircraft. It has been maintained exclusively within the Authorized Service Center network and flown by a commercial-rated pilot/owner. No time has been spared in keeping excellent records, including digital records of all manuals.   Regularly used, N978SR’s normal flight profile is of medium-length flights, reducing the development of any corrosion and abnormal wear and tear.   Do not hesitate to get in touch and learn more about this stunning SR22.   Transition training is included through the Cirrus Embark Program for Eligible Pilots!\r\nAlways Authorized Cirrus Service Center Maintained Regular usage by a professional owner/pilot Significant Upgrades, including starter motor, exterior lights and fuel pump Meticulous record-keeping"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 2,
"name": "Diamond DA50 237||_||, Europe, United Kingdom - England",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373801_373900/aircraft-single-piston-diamond-da-50-373803_7085643d51f9bef2_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/diamond/da-50/373803",
"description": "The Diamond DA50 RG delivers an exceptional combination of performance, efficiency and comfort. Powered by the 300-hp Continental CD-300 Jet-A turbo-diesel and equipped with advanced Garmin G1000 NXi avionics, G-DOGA offers modern technology, a spacious five-seat cabin, and the sleek efficiency of retractable landing gear. Aircraft will be delivered with a fresh annual inspection.\r\nWith only 530 total hours since new, this aircraft presents as a highly desirable, late-generation single-engine platform ideal for business travel, touring, or owner-operators transitioning into a modern high-performance composite aircraft. The DA50’s quiet cabin, fuel economy, and excellent handling characteristics make it one of the most compelling new-generation piston aircraft on the market.\r\nWill accept part-exchange for the right aircraft.\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nOnly 530 Hours since new, delivered with fresh annual inspection\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nContinental CD-300 FADEC turbo-diesel engine, for low operating costs\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nAdvanced Garmin G1000 NXi avionics\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nFive-seat luxury interior with gull-wing doors for easy access\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nPart-Exchange may be considered\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 3,
"name": "Cirrus SR22 237||_||, Europe, United Kingdom - England",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373401_373500/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22-373436_2e9df47309a59295_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22/373436",
"description": "Lone Mountain Aircraft is proud to present this UK based Cirrus G1 SR22. This well cared for aircraft offers an affordable entry into “The Cirrus Life” with TKS anti-ice, a high useful load, Aspen Evolution PFD paired with Avidyne MFD and of course the Cirrus Airframe Parachute system, CAPS. It has come out of an extensive November 2025 annual. This aircraft represents a solid and desirable early SR22 configuration, offering excellent performance, safety, and comfort.\r\nEmbark training available for owner pilots who qualify.\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nPrivate usage & High maintenance pedigree\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nOnly 500 hours on the Factory Rebuilt engine\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nExtensive annual recently completed – next due in October 2026\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nAlways maintained by Authorized Cirrus Service Centers\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nReady for delivery to US or worldwide\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 4,
"name": "Cirrus SR22T G6 GTS 237||_||, North America + Canada, United States - NC",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373601_373700/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22t-g6-gts-373684_932acca371d8b496_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22t-g6-gts/373684",
"description": "One US owner since new 5-year spinner-to-tail warranty valid through June 2028 Cirrus Service Center maintained Hartzell 4-Blade Composite Prop Cirrus Executive, Awareness, and Advantage Upgrades Certified FIKI Annual due March 2026 –Perfect opportunity to use as pre-buy inspection"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 5,
"name": "Cirrus SR22T GTS 237||_||, North America + Canada, United States - NC",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373501_373600/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22t-gts-373536_62e18097a7593558_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22t-gts/373536",
"description": "• Cirrus Arrivée Edition w/ Bespoke Edition Interior • Cirrus Perspective+ by Garmin Cockpit • Cirrus Global Connect - Worldwide Voice and Text Messaging • Certified Flight into Known Icing • Built-In Precise Flight Oxygen System • Tanis Avionics and Engine Preheater • High Performance Beringer Wheels and Brakes • Cirrus Airframe Parachute System® (CAPS®) • SiriusXM Weather & Audio"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 6,
"name": "Cirrus SR22 G3 Turbo GTS 237||_||, Europe, United Kingdom - England",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373301_373400/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22-g3-turbo-gts-373379_f7017ae5f0cfc967_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22-g3-turbo-gts/373379",
"description": "Lone Mountain Aircraft is proud to present this Cirrus SR22T G3. With Cirrus Perspective avionics and FIKI, this aircraft is perfect for traveling and equipped for North American and European operations! VAT is paid on this aircraft for free movement within the UK.\r\nTransition Training is included in the purchase of this aircraft through Cirrus Embark Program for eligible pilots.\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nRecent completion of major inspections and significant care throughout\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nGreat spec including FIKI, Oxygen and Active Traffic\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nUK & EU VAT Paid\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nNo Damage history\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 7,
"name": "Cirrus SR22T G7 GTS 237||_||, Europe, United Kingdom - England",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373301_373400/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22t-g7-gts-373367_5ce69a9b828902b7_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22t-g7-gts/373367",
"description": "Lone Mountain Aircraft is pleased to offer this 2024 G7 SR22 available for immediate delivery! Only 202 hours Since New so it still smells new, but has all the delivery snags sorted! Cirrus Perspective Touch+ Flight Deck with Dual Touch Screen Controllers, Improved Legroom & Visibility, FIKI, Automated Fuel Management System, Low Drag Advanced Wheel Fairings, 3-Bladed Composite Propeller, Push Button Start, Factory Air-Conditioning, GFC 700 Autopilot, DME and more!!\r\nFinancing is available with low rates so call Lone Mountain Aircraft today at 1-888-566-3686 to learn more about this and any of our other Cirrus Aircraft available for sale! Cirrus Embark Training Included with Purchase for Eligible Pilots!\r\nSR22 GTS Generation 7 Cirrus Perspective Touch+ Avionics Includes Satellite Phone and DME Spinner to Tail Warranty until October 2029 Factory Air-Conditioning"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 8,
"name": "Cirrus SR22 G2 GTS 237||_||, Europe, Italy",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373101_373200/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22-g2-gts-373125_ba244dd9c5ca8c9b_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22-g2-gts/373125",
"description": "Lone Mountain Aircraft is proud to introduce N863SR! A low time Generation 2 SR22 GTS equipped with a DFC90 autopilot, dual 430 WAAS, and much more! Don’t pass up this well cared for aircraft.\r\nTransition Training is included in the purchase of this aircraft through Cirrus Embark Program for Eligible Pilots!\r\nLow rates and flexible term financing is available, so call Lone Mountain Aircraft today at 1-888-566-3686 to learn more about this and any of our other Cirrus Aircraft available for sale!\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nIFR Equipped\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nAlways Hangared\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nDFC 90 Autopilot\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nNo Damage History\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 9,
"name": "Piper M350 237||_||, North America + Canada, United States - NJ",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373201_373300/aircraft-turboprops-piper-m350-373273_081e43c3a7a75497_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/turboprops/piper/m350/373273",
"description": "This immaculate Piper M350 recently completed a Piper Service Center annual inspection 11/2025. Loaded with options including the Awareness Package, All Weather Package, Premium Package, WX500 Stormscope, GSR 56 Iridium, and more! 350 Hours Total Time, no damage history, 1-owner aircraft. Striking gray and blue exterior is complimented by the optional Premium Geneva (Gray) Executive Interior with carbon fiber accents.\r\n\r\nBalance of Airframe / Avionics / Engine Warranty Through 11/17/2025\r\nPropeller Waranty Through 11/17/2027\r\nOne Owner, No Damage History\r\nService Center Maintained\r\nOwner to Retain Existing Registration Number (To be changed to N751CG at Seller’s Expense)\r\n\r\n\r\n \r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 10,
"name": "Cirrus SR22T G6 GTS 237||_||, Europe, United Kingdom - England",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373101_373200/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22t-g6-gts-373163_be202804983a532e_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22t-g6-gts/373163",
"description": "Lone Mountain aircraft is proud to present this striking SR22T with extended warranty, made beautiful by the custom-painted simplicity of meteorite gray. This G6 SR22T boasts a fully-loaded specification including Flight Into Known Icing, A/C, DME and Cirrus Global Connext - Satellite Weather, Text-messaging and Telephone. For any UK-based buyer, VAT is included. With only 145 hours this is one of the lowest hour G6 SR22T’s on the market and with the extended 5-year Spinner to tail warranty you can look forward to maximum flying and minimal headaches. \r\nTransition Training is included in the purchase of this aircraft through Cirrus Embark Program.\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nLow-time, Like-new G6 SR22T in 1-of-1 custom Xi Meteorite Gray\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nUK-VAT paid\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nLike new G6 SR22T in Phantom Gray\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nExtended 5 year Spinner-to-Tail Warranty until August 2028\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nFully Equipped, including Flight Into Known Icing, A/C and DME\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nCirrus Global Connect - Satellite Weather, Text-messaging and Telephone\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 11,
"name": "Cirrus SR22 G2 237||_||, Europe, Guernsey",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/371201_371300/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22-g2-371293_a84aaa547725f231_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22-g2/371293",
"description": "Lone Mountain Aircraft is excited to present this incredibly upgraded SR22 G2. With a Garmin G500TXI panel that will rival many corporate jets this is a unique opportunity to move into an aircraft that has some remarkable capabilities. The touchscreen panels give crystal clear PFD/MFD capabilities including engine monitoring. It also boasts an upgraded autopilot, inflight weather, texting and calls via Iridium and enough USB chargers to keep you and your passengers entertained no matter how long the flight. On top of its outstanding panel upgrades, this wonderful aircraft benefits from a recent CAPS repack and, with only 610 hours on the engine and 180 hours on the prop, it still has plenty of flying left to give!\r\nDelivery to anywhere in the contiguous US included in price.\r\nTransition Training is included in the purchase of this aircraft through Cirrus Embark Program for eligible pilots.\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nIncredible Garmin G500TXI upgraded panel. Touchscreen, Inflight weather, USB charging and more!\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nSold with recent CAPs repack. Not due again until 2034!\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nEngine Overhaul in 2017 (610 hours Since overhaul)\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nProp Overhaul in 2022 (180 hours since overhaul)\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nTKS Anti-Ice\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n "
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 12,
"name": "Cirrus SR22T G6 GTS 237||_||, Europe, United Kingdom - Scotland",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/372201_372300/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22t-g6-gts-372250_c337c016afa1c52e_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22t-g6-gts/372250",
"description": "Lone Mountain Aircraft is pleased to bring to market this stunning Zanzibar SR22T GTS. This beautiful aircraft will stand out on any ramp with its vibrant color scheme and a full GTS spec including Air conditioning, FIKI, Factory Oxygen and DME mean it can complete your next aviation mission safely and in comfort. It boasts an extended 5 year warranty into 2027 and will be sold with a fresh June annual meaning minimal scheduled maintenance for its next owner.\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nCirrus 5-Year Spinner-To-Tail warranty until April 2027\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nSupplied with fresh annual, next annual due until June 2027\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nAir conditioning, Factory O2, and DME (distance measuring equipment)\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nCirrus IQ - Mobile App Aircraft Interface\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nCirrus Global Connext - Satellite Weather, Text-messaging and Telephone\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 13,
"name": "Cirrus SR22 G2 237||_||, Europe, United Kingdom - England",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/371301_371400/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22-g2-371349_58c192e413b8b0e6_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22-g2/371349",
"description": "Available for immediate delivery this G2 SR22 boasts some amazing avionics upgrades including a GTN750Xi GPS/NAV/COM freshly installed in 2022. It also has an upgraded ADSB in and out remote transponder and a recently refurbished interior which included new roof panel and seat coverings and carpets.\r\nEmbark training available for owner pilots who qualify.\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nExtensive Avionics upgrade including GTN750Xi\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nFresh CAPs repack and line cutter replacement\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nRoof panels, leather seat coverings and carpets replaced in 2022\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nAvailable immediately\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nEASA registration\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 14,
"name": "Beechcraft A36 Bonanza 237||_||, Southern Africa, South Africa",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/371901_372000/aircraft-single-piston-beechcraft-a36-bonanza-371977_c8c8b2d816b021ac_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/beechcraft/a36-bonanza/371977",
"description": "Renowned for its sleek design and high performance, this versatile 1999 single-engine aircraft offers a smooth and comfortable flying experience.\r\nIts cabin accommodates five passengers plus the pilot, making it ideal for family trips or business travel. With impressive range and reliability, the A36 stands out as a dependable choice for both seasoned pilots and enthusiasts.\r\nIt combines elegance with exceptional capabilities, making it a trusted aircraft year after year."
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 15,
"name": "Cirrus SR22T G6 GTS 237||_||, North America + Canada, United States - OH",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/371501_371600/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22t-g6-gts-371576_0b4f9eea980246b6_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22t-g6-gts/371576",
"description": "Lone Mountain aircraft are proud to bring to market this beautiful SR22T with just one hundred flight hours! Enjoy that new aircraft smell with none of the teething problems. This beautiful aircraft boasts a great spec, and the Carbon Evolution red paint scheme will turn heads on any ramp.\r\nAvailable immediately.\r\nCirrus Embark Transition Training available for owner pilots who qualify.\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nJust one hundred flight hours!\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nLike new SR22T in head turning Evolution red\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n3 year Spinner to tail Warranty until November 2026\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nGTS spec including flight into known icing and air conditioning\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nHartzell 4-Blade Composite Propeller\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 16,
"name": "Cirrus SR22 237||_||, Europe, Belgium",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/368801_368900/aircraft-single-piston-cirrus-sr22-368865_8b09c4232062b12f_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cirrus/sr22/368865",
"description": "\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nLone Mountain Aircraft is proud to present this highly upgraded 2004 SR22. Benefitting from TKS Anti-Ice system, two Avidyne IFD 440s, and the DFC90 digital autopilot, this aircraft is equipped for many hours of adventures and is fully IFR equipped. EU VAT is paid. CAPS not due until 2033.\r\nEmbark training available for owner pilots who qualify.\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nEU VAT PAID\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nDual Avidyne IFD440 GPS/NAV/COMs and DFC90 Digital Autopilot, among others\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nOnly 2 owners\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nPrecise Flight Oxygen Fitted\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nADL Weather receiver\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nCAPS not due until 2033\r\n \r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 17,
"name": "Gippsland GA-8 237||_||, Europe, United Kingdom - England",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/371501_371600/aircraft-single-piston-gippsland-ga-8-371512_828a29566b1acd80_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/gippsland/ga-8/371512",
"description": "Lone Mountain Aircraft is pleased to bring this meticulously maintained Turbocharged GA8 Airvan to market. The Airvan is known for being a versatile workhorse for aerial surveying, cargo transport, skydiving operations, sightseeing and many other applications. This aircraft has spent most of its life as a formation camera ship for warbird pleasure flights. It has only been flown by professional pilots in this role and has been maintained to stringent EASA/CAA commercial standards. It has no damage history and is supplied with a freshly overhauled prop ready to give her next operator years of service.\r\nDiscounted worldwide ferry options are available.\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nHigher Power Turbocharged Engine\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nFresh Annual Inspection and Newly Overhauled Prop\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nUsed for photo flights\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nOnly flown by professional pilots\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nMaintained to EASA/CAA commercial standards (Part 145 and Part CAO requirements for operation on a UK AOC)\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 18,
"name": "Beechcraft A36 Bonanza 237||_||, Europe, Germany",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373801_373900/aircraft-single-piston-beechcraft-a36-bonanza-373821_d5054f378c144c3f_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/beechcraft/a36-bonanza/373821",
"description": "The Beechcraft Bonanza A36 is widely regarded as one of the most successful and versatile high-performance single-engine aircraft ever built, combining excellent cross-country performance with outstanding comfort and load-carrying capability. This particular aircraft stands out due to its very well-preserved overall condition, careful ownership history and an exceptionally comprehensive avionics suite. The modern glass cockpit configuration with Garmin G500 and GTN-series navigators provides a highly capable IFR platform with excellent situational awareness and navigation capability. With its combination of classic Bonanza performance, modern avionics and meticulous care, this aircraft represents an attractive opportunity for pilots seeking a well-equipped and proven traveling aircraft. We offer this aircraft as exclusive broker - contact us for any question!"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 19,
"name": "Cessna 182T Skylane 237||_||, Europe, Germany",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373801_373900/aircraft-single-piston-cessna-182t-skylane-373819_79e5c3b00c7a9b88_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cessna/182t-skylane/373819",
"description": "Get ready to elevate your hangar! We are thrilled to announce this exceptionally maintained 2004 Cessna 182T Skylane. This is a rare opportunity to own a modern, mission-ready machine that perfectly balances classic ruggedness with sophisticated glass-cockpit technology.\r\n This Skylane features approximately 2,912 airframe hours and is powered by an engine with only 304 hours since its November 2023 overhaul, allowing you to fly with absolute peace of mind.\r\n  The cockpit is headlined by a fully integrated Garmin G1000 avionics suite, complemented by a Garmin GTX33 Transponder, Bendix King KN63 DME, and the KAP 140 Autopilot. For those who prioritize safety and situational awareness, the aircraft comes equipped with a TAS 600 traffic system and a WX500 stormscope. Fully IFR certified, IFR equipped, and maintained to the highest standards, this aircraft is ready to change owners and head straight to work. With its fresh engine and high-spec panel, it offers the performance and reliability of a much newer aircraft without the wait.\r\n Contact us to schedule your viewing at sales@faaircraftsales.com\r\n Price € 359,000.00 VAT Free"
},
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 20,
"name": "Cessna Turbo 206H Stationair 237||_||, Europe, Germany",
"image": "https://cdn.avbuyer.com/live/uploads/image/373801_373900/aircraft-single-piston-cessna-turbo-206h-stationair-373816_768097650ebd42ef_350X200_c.jpg",
"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/single-piston/cessna/turbo-206h-stationair/373816",
"description": "***** DETAILS *****\r\nwww.cessna206.de\r\n***** DETAILS *****\r\n2007 Cessna T206H Since 2008 in Germany, only one private Owner Complete History available No damage Always hangared Full IFR Garmin G1000 Garmin Autopilot TCAS Chapter 10 Noise Certificate"
}
